overall.description: First-person gameplay from a truck simulator showing a Mercedes Actros cabin driving through a snowy rural highway. The truck navigates winding roads and overtakes other vehicles during active snowfall, with snow-covered fields and forests lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight snow-covered rural highway with tree lines

agents.ego_description: driving straight along the highway maintaining steady speed through the falling snow

entered.detail: two-lane highway covered in snow with visible tire tracks extending into the distance
snow-covered wooden fence running parallel to the right side of the highway
dense evergreen forest covered in heavy snow lining the left side of the road
dense evergreen forest covered in heavy snow lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a straight stretch of snow-covered highway flanked by dense pine forests on both sides. The truck maintains a steady speed along the two-lane road, with snow-covered wooden fences visible on the right. Active snowfall reduces visibility slightly, and the Mercedes dashboard shows the driver navigating through the winter landscape with no other vehicles immediately nearby.

events.description: highway begins curving to the right, requiring steering adjustment
passing a 50 km/h speed limit sign posted on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: steering through a right-hand curve while maintaining traction on the slippery snow-covered surface

entered.detail: circular white regulatory sign with black border indicating 50 km/h speed limit
silver metal guardrail installed along the right curve for safety

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a right-hand curve on the highway, passing a 50 km/h speed limit sign. Metal guardrails replace the wooden fences along the right side as the road bends through the snowy landscape. The driver steers carefully through the turn while the left side remains lined with snow-covered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with industrial building and overtaking maneuver

events.description: overtaking a slow-moving cargo truck ahead on the highway
large gray industrial building comes into view on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: overtaking a slower truck ahead while monitoring the road and maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: large cargo truck moving slowly in the same direction being overtaken

entered.detail: large rectangular industrial warehouse with gray walls and flat roof
highway gantry with directional signs mounted above the road

segments.scene_description: The truck overtakes a slower cargo vehicle while passing through a section with an industrial building visible on the right. The metal guardrail runs closer to the truck as the road straightens, and overhead road signs appear in the distance. The surrounding vegetation thins out, revealing more open snow-covered terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with fields and distant forests

events.description: navigating a gentle left-hand curve in the highway
passing a 70 km/h speed limit sign on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway through alternating curves and straight sections with open fields on both sides

entered.detail: circular white speed limit sign indicating 70 km/h maximum speed
expansive open field completely covered in snow with no tree cover

segments.scene_description: The final stretch features open snow-covered fields on both sides of the highway, with distant pine forests visible on the horizon. The truck passes a 70 km/h speed limit sign and navigates gentle curves. The industrial building recedes behind as the truck continues through the expansive winter landscape, with guardrails running parallel to the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from a dense, forested highway into an expansive, open winter landscape. It begins on a straight stretch of snow-covered road flanked by thick pine forests and wooden fences under a steady snowfall. As the truck enters a right-hand curve, the wooden fences transition into metal guardrails and the camera passes a speed limit sign while steering through the bend. The scene then shifts as the truck overtakes a slower cargo vehicle, passing an industrial building and overhead road signs while the surrounding vegetation begins to thin. Finally, the environment opens up into wide, snow-covered fields with distant forests on the horizon as the truck navigates gentle curves past a new speed limit sign.
